title: Qualifying API Suppliers: Core Steps
alt: Five-step process for qualifying active substance suppliers under EU GMP

items.label: Risk-rank under ICH Q9
items.desc: Score each API and supplier by patient risk to set assessment depth.

items.label: Map the real manufacturer
items.desc: Trace the chain to the actual site, not just the invoicing party.

items.label: Assess documented evidence
items.desc: Review GMP status, specification, CoA and quality questionnaire.

items.label: Audit on a risk basis
items.desc: On-site GMP audit vs EU GMP Part II for higher-risk material.

items.label: Quality agreement and oversight
items.desc: Define responsibilities; review status as the evidence changes.
